overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character in a futuristic delivery suit traversing a desolate rocky mountain landscape at night. The scene features a dark, overcast sky with visible stars, jagged mountain peaks in the distance, and a barren sandy terrain.

events.description: brief bright flash illuminates the landscape, possibly lightning or atmospheric phenomenon, before returning to darkness

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the barren rocky terrain toward the distant mountain peak, wearing a futuristic suit with a large backpack and cargo

entered.detail: large jagged mountain formation silhouetted against the night sky, serving as the focal point of the landscape
scattered rock outcrops and boulders lining the left side of the path
scattered rock outcrops and boulders lining the right side of the path
flat sandy desert floor with small scattered stones and minimal texture

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a desolate mountain wasteland at night, walking steadily toward a prominent jagged peak in the distance. The barren landscape is flanked by rocky outcrops on both sides, with a flat sandy ground underfoot. A brief flash of light momentarily illuminates the scene around the 6-second mark before the darkness returns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate mountain wasteland at night as a character advances toward a distant, jagged peak. It begins with the character walking steadily across flat sandy ground, flanked by imposing rocky outcrops under a dark, overcast sky. As the journey continues, a sudden flash of light momentarily pierces the gloom, illuminating the barren terrain and the surrounding stone. The scene then settles back into deep shadow, maintaining its steady forward momentum toward the silhouette of the mountain peak.
